questionHtml:
What is the value of x when 32.2 g of Na2SO4•xH2O are heated leaving 14.2 g of anhydrous Na2SO4? Mr(H2O) = 18; Mr(Na2SO4) = 142.

Na2SO4•xH2O (s) → Na2SO4 (s) + xH2O (g)

A. 0.1

B. 1

C. 5

D. 10

meta.title: What is the value of x when 32.2 g of Na2SO4•xH2O are heated leaving 14.2 g of anhydrous Na2SO4? Mr(H2O) = 18; Mr(Na2SO4) = 142. Na2SO4•xH2O (s) → Na2SO4 (s) + xH2O (g) A. 0.1 B. 1
